channel.title: Passage at St. Augustine
channel.description: Latest posts from Passage at St. Augustine

item.title: Community Film Festivals and Cultural Preservation
item.description: How local film festivals support emerging artists and preserve cultural narratives.

item.title: Documentary Ethics: Truth-Telling in Visual Media
item.description: The ethical responsibilities of documentary filmmakers and the line between storytelling and manipulation.

item.title: The Economics of Film Production and Distribution
item.description: Understanding the financial landscape of independent film from funding to audience reach.

item.title: The Power of Documentary Storytelling in Shaping Public Discourse
item.description: The Power of Documentary Storytelling in Shaping Public Discourse — an in-depth exploration with evidence-based insights.

item.title: The Power of Independent Film in Social Change
item.description: How independent filmmakers use storytelling to drive awareness, empathy, and policy reform.

item.title: How to Use Historical Documentaries in Modern Civil Rights Education: Lessons from St. Augustine
item.description: Discover effective strategies for incorporating historical civil rights documentaries like Passage at St. Augustine into educational curricula and community programs.
